_note: Golden calibration table for confidence.predict_error (Phase 2.4). Append one row per Rider/customer-verified job: its computed confidence inputs + the measured per-job error. The calibrator reports calibrated=False until len(rows) >= confidence.MIN_CALIBRATION (8). Seeded 2026-06-13 with the Fishkill data point; grow it from Rider's Drive takeoffs to activate calibration.
